---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Got an idea to make Aegis better? Tell us about it
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Describe the Solution You'd Like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've thought about.

## How Would This Benefit Users?

Explain who would find this useful and why it matters in real-world incident response scenarios.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
